item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 2min Confident!
Ziggy Starshine canters over the line, just in front of the onrushing Seed

AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 8min "If she stays, she's going to be there or thereabouts!"
@MikeBellRacing with an updat
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 14min Francis-Henri Graffard tells @KfordCailler : "She could run in the Prix Saint Alary an
item.description:
At The Races @AtTheRaces · 14min Francis-Henri Graffard tells @KfordCailler : "She could run in the Prix Saint Alary and then it will be a choice between the Prix de Diane or Oaks.
"On her physical side and her attitude she looks like an Oaks filly but there is plenty of speed in her pedigree which may suit the Mostrar más Cita At The Races @AtTheRaces · 54min 0:38
GILDED PRIZE is in a league of her own at Saint-Cloud...
@ctkjockey @GraffardRacing @JuddmonteFarms 2 12 2 mil

item.description: Sporting Life Racing reposteó Matt Brocklebank @MattBrocklebank · 54min SATURDAY selections at 40/1, 40/1 and 16/1 in this week's Value Bet column: De sportinglife.com 1 3 594
